hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '/dashboard/.*\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd /home/kiddulu/Projects/WebAppBH/dashboard && npx eslint --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi

file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '/workers/[^/]+/(base_tool|pipeline)\.py$|/workers/[^/]+/tools/[^/]+\.py$'; then echo 'SECURITY-SENSITIVE FILE MODIFIED: Run the security-reviewer agent on this file before continuing.' >&2; fi

FLAG=/tmp/.webbh-code-reviewed; if [ -f "$FLAG" ]; then rm -f "$FLAG"; exit 0; else echo 'SIMPLIFY + CODE REVIEW (one-shot ritual): (1) Run /simplify to clean up changed code. (2) Run the code-reviewer agent on staged changes. Then retry git commit. Re-running proceeds; this hook does not verify either ran.' >&2; touch "$FLAG"; exit 1; fi
